text.title: Postmortem Action Item SLO Tracking Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the ledger artefact (rendered as JSON for validator), with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "owner": {"person": "ruslan", "role": "SRE lead"}, "review_cadence": "weekly", "retention_months": 24, "entries": [ { "id": 1, "ts": "2026-05-12T09:30:00Z", "owner": "ruslan", "hypothesis_or_event": "INC-441 prod 500s after Redis upgrade", "evidence_link": "https://github.com/org/repo/issues/441", "outcome": "pending", "next": "Add connection pool size alert", "slo_class": "P1", "slo_due": "2026-05-26" } ] }

example.note: owner is a team alias; review_cadence not in enum; retention < 12; entry missing evidence_link, outcome, next, slo_class, slo_due.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: owner.person is a team alias or channel
entries edited in place (validator checks git history)
